tools.name: list_my_posts
tools.description: List your synced LinkedIn posts, newest first. Scoped to one profile when profile_id is given, otherwise all your profiles. Requires an active subscription.

tools.name: get_my_profile_stats
tools.description: Get engagement statistics and recent posts for one of your LinkedIn profiles. Defaults to your primary profile when profile_id is omitted. Requires an active subscription.

tools.name: get_my_growth
tools.description: Get follower-growth statistics over the last days_back days for one LinkedIn profile. Defaults to your primary profile when profile_id is omitted.

tools.name: get_my_goals
tools.description: List your growth goals with progress. Optionally filter by status (e.g. active, completed).
